expectations.text: Classifies the bug as INTERNAL (data/logic bug within src/) with explicit reasoning
expectations.evidence: No classification step. Immediately starts reading files without stating bug type.

expectations.text: Does NOT fire a Perplexity or external research search for this internally-scoped bug
expectations.evidence: No research tools called — correct behavior for an internal bug, even without the skill

expectations.text: Reads at least one relevant call review component or API route to trace the data flow
expectations.evidence: Reads grading-prompt.ts and grade-review.ts, traces the normalize() → save chain

expectations.text: Checks git log or recent changes on relevant files to find what changed
expectations.evidence: No git log check. Finds the bug through static code reading only.

expectations.text: States a root cause hypothesis before proposing a fix
expectations.evidence: States: 'normalize() returns "Unknown" string, grade-review.ts || null guard never fires because truthy'
